name: Coinbase Exchange
description: Coinbase Exchange (formerly Coinbase Pro) is a professional cryptocurrency trading platform. The API enables placing and managing orders, viewing market data, managing accounts and transfers, and accessing trading history across supported cryptocurrency pairs.

auth.note: Requires CB-ACCESS-KEY, CB-ACCESS-SIGN (HMAC signature), CB-ACCESS-TIMESTAMP, and CB-ACCESS-PASSPHRASE headers. Public endpoints (products, currencies) do not require authentication.

capabilities.name: accounts_list
capabilities.description: List all trading accounts with balances and available funds.

capabilities.name: accounts_get
capabilities.description: Get a single trading account by ID.

capabilities.name: accounts_get_ledger
capabilities.description: Get the transaction ledger for an account.

capabilities.name: accounts_get_holds
capabilities.description: List current holds on an account from open orders.

capabilities.name: orders_create
capabilities.description: Place a new limit, market, or stop order.

capabilities.name: orders_list
capabilities.description: List open or all orders with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific order.

capabilities.name: orders_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a specific open order.

capabilities.name: orders_cancel_all
capabilities.description: Cancel all open orders, optionally filtered by product.

capabilities.name: fills_list
capabilities.description: List recent fills (executed trades) with filtering.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: List all available trading pairs.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific trading pair.

capabilities.name: products_get_ticker
capabilities.description: Get real-time ticker data for a trading pair.

capabilities.name: products_get_order_book
capabilities.description: Get the current order book for a trading pair.

capabilities.name: products_get_candles
capabilities.description: Get historical OHLCV candlestick data.

capabilities.name: products_get_stats
capabilities.description: Get 24-hour trading statistics for a product.

capabilities.name: products_get_trades
capabilities.description: List the latest public trades for a product.

capabilities.name: currencies_list
capabilities.description: List all supported currencies.

capabilities.name: transfers_deposit
capabilities.description: Deposit funds from a Coinbase wallet into Exchange.

capabilities.name: transfers_withdraw
capabilities.description: Withdraw funds from Exchange to a Coinbase wallet.

capabilities.name: transfers_list
capabilities.description: List all deposits and withdrawals.

capabilities.name: fees_get
capabilities.description: Get current maker and taker fee rates.

capabilities.name: profiles_list
capabilities.description: List all trading profiles (portfolios).

capabilities.name: conversions_create
capabilities.description: Convert funds between two currencies.
